channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Medium sized pothole I the middle of the road., 4th March
item.description:
The pothole is outside the driveway to No.1 Pilley Crescent. It has been a problem for at least 2 weeks. Due to the break up of the hole it has caused lots of stone debris on the road. Also because people are trying to avoid the pothole causing them to drive dangerously close to parked cars.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Pilley Crescent, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 4th March
item.description:
Cw Gully X2 Need resetting Stats required 4 way lights (Broken Chamber Cover/Frame)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 4th March
item.description:
Nwd make safe Cones and keep right arrow boards And chapter 8 signage Cw pothole Around gully Give and take 28 day raised (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pedestrian light not working, 4th March
item.description:
The pedestrian light is not working when you press the button. It’s only on this corner (Arle Road/gloucester Road) and all others are working when pressed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 84, Gloucester Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Green or amber traffic light is not working

item.title: In wet weather the branch rubs against the telegraph line., 4th March
item.description:
Outside 53 Milton Road Cheltenham GL51 7EU

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 53, Milton Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
